purpose_of_release.purpose_of_release_line_1: To provide my primary care physician, Dr. Emily Carter, MD, with a complete copy of my recent blood work and diagnostic laboratory results for continuity of care and follow-up evaluation of elevated liver enzymes and cholesterol levels.
purpose_of_release.purpose_of_release_line_2: I have an upcoming appointment scheduled to review these lab results and to adjust my current medications (including atorvastatin and lisinopril) if necessary, and my physician has requested that the official laboratory report be sent directly to her office in advance of the visit so she can compare these values with my prior results from earlier this year.
purpose_of_release.purpose_of_release_line_3: Additionally, I would like these results to be kept on file in my primary care record to assist in long-term monitoring of my metabolic health, including assessment of potential prediabetes, liver function, and cardiovascular risk factors, as well as to facilitate any necessary referrals to specialists (such as a hepatologist or cardiologist) based on these findings.
